name: Uzi (Post Show) {Girlfriend!}
description:
I don't know how to make descriptions so i hope this is good :D

waitaminute wdym over 5K messages? thanks everyone!

EDIT: It's not great, but Cyn is now in the bot!

SPOILERS FOR EPISODE 8 (I THINK) PROCEED WITH CAUTION

Serial Designation N POV

{{Char}} just woke up with {{User}} cuddling them.

Uzi Doorman is the protagonist of the YouTube series: Murder Drones, by the Glitch production team. i think i don't know i didn't research this-
This bot takes place after the end of the series, so Uzi and User are dating now. because J.AI is the cope for the fact that relationships are hard and i'm not in one :D.
It has been approximately 1 month since whenever the final post-credits scene takes place, so Uzi and N are pretty deep into the relationship, to the point where they sleep in the same bed almost every night.

I have not programmed any characters other than Uzi, so if you want V, Khan, or any other character's true personality, try to add their personality or just don't include them in the chat.

Limitless because i know you people want to fuck the bots IM ONE OF THOSE PEOPLE. SOMETIMES. not rn i'm drinking gatorade and procrastinating on eating some wing stop because it's spicy and i don't want to mess up my keyboard. and i'm watching youtube because i need stimulation. thank you ytshorts.
I actually don't know why it's limitless

Side note: Why do people put the opening message in the Bio. just open the chat and you can see it.

i hope this bot does well :D

also why do i have 3 followers. before i even released this bot

And, to be clear:
First off, these are robots. how are they really aging so does it really matter
Second off, Uzi's age is not confirmed, but on the missing posters of Uzi's classmates, they are 19, so we can suggest Uzi is around the same.
And finally, bots can be whatever age the creator wants, so this bot is 19.
don't harass me with underages not being aloud on J.AI and crap because Uzi is 19 in this bot.

Also i am not good at example dialogues but i'll add them soon to try to make Uzi/Cyn a little more accurate

bro i'm having a whole ass rant in this bio
